_about: Canonical data for the Token-Budget Slider demo. web/index.html embeds a copy of this so it runs offline by double-click. Accuracy values and the latency model are ILLUSTRATIVE (simulated mode) and clearly labeled as such in the UI; run data/eval_sweep.py to replace them with measured numbers on your own footage.

model.vision_encoder: SigLIP2 NaFlex (base, ~86M), patch size 16, 2-layer MLP projector with pixel unshuffle (downsample factor 2)
model.notes: max_image_tokens is an image-processor kwarg (companion floor min_image_tokens); set at inference time, no retraining. 256 is the documented default max; raising it above 256 is supported (a single large image can reach ~1020 tokens). 512 is an extended, above-documented stop.

citations.claim: Model class, model_type lfm2_vl, SigLIP2 encoder, patch/tile/downsample geometry, image_token_id 396, min_image_tokens 64 / max_image_tokens 256 defaults.
Model card: transformers v5.1+, native resolution up to 512x512, tiling for large images, user-tunable max image tokens and tile count for speed/quality without retraining.
Token<->resolution mapping (256x384=>96 tokens, 384x680=>240, 1000x3000=>1020); tunable max image tokens controls effective input resolution.

latency_model._note: ILLUSTRATIVE, NOT a measured LFM2.5-VL benchmark. latency_ms = base + per_token*tokens + quad*tokens^2, on the reference laptop, times the device factor, plus small per-scene offset and per-drag jitter. Shape (flat-ish at low budget, rising at high) reflects prefill growing with vision tokens over a roughly fixed short decode.
latency_model.reference_hardware: Apple Silicon laptop (MPS, fp16) — assumed, not measured

device_presets.label: This Mac · MPS
device_presets.note: Reference laptop. Shows the shape of the tradeoff, not a specific device's number.

device_presets.label: Jetson Orin Nano
device_presets.note: Estimate. Runs on the board's CPU/GPU via PyTorch, NOT its NPU.

device_presets.label: Phone-class NPU
device_presets.note: PROJECTED. Requires a vendor runtime; this transformers/PyTorch build does not touch the NPU.

prompt: Describe the scene in one sentence.

scenes.label: Package on step
scenes.ground_truth: A parcel is on the porch step; no person present.

levels.desc: Something is sitting on the porch.
An object is on the step near the door.
A box or parcel is on the porch step.
A cardboard package is sitting on the top step.
A cardboard box is on the top step, just left of the door.
A medium cardboard package sits on the top step, to the left of the welcome mat.
A medium cardboard parcel sits on the top step, left of the mat; a shipping label is visible on top.
A medium cardboard parcel sits on the top step, left of the welcome mat, a shipping label facing up; no person is in frame.

scenes.label: Person at door
scenes.ground_truth: One person standing at the front door.

levels.desc: A person may be near the door.
A person is at the door.
A person is standing at the front door.
One person stands at the front door, facing it.
One adult stands at the front door, facing the door, a hand near the handle.
One adult in a dark jacket stands at the front door, facing it.
One adult in a dark jacket stands at the door, facing it, appears to be pressing the doorbell.
A single adult in a dark jacket stands at the front door, facing it, a hand raised toward the doorbell; no package visible.
A person is at the door.
One, possibly two people near the door.
Two people appear to be at the door.
Two people stand at the front door.
Two adults stand at the front door, side by side.
Two adults stand at the front door, one slightly behind the other.
Two adults at the door; one in front facing the door, one behind holding a phone.
Two adults at the front door — one in a light top facing the door, a second in darker clothing standing just behind to the right.

scenes.label: Empty porch (branch)
scenes.ground_truth: Empty porch; a tree branch is moving. No person or package.

levels.desc: A person appears to be standing near the door.
Someone may be at the edge of the porch.
Possibly a figure near the railing, or foliage.
The porch looks empty; some movement at the edge of the frame.
The porch is empty; a plant or branch is moving near the railing.
The porch is empty; a tree branch is swaying at the left edge of the frame.
No person on the porch; a tree branch moves at the left edge, casting a shifting shadow.
The porch is empty — no person or package. A tree branch sways at the left edge of the frame, and its shadow moves across the step.
